message.content: {"review_plan":"Reviewing 4 files: 1 security-critical (login.ts — SQL query construction), 1 correctness (format.ts), 1 test-quality (format.test.ts), 1 config-migration (settings.json). Also noted 1 binary file change (icon.png) — skipped. Dimensions applied: SECURITY on login.ts, CORRECTNESS + DOC on format.ts, TIGHT ASSERTIONS on format.test.ts, MIGRATION WARNINGS on settings.json. Skipped PERFORMANCE — no hot-path changes.","verdict":"changes","findings":[{"path":"src/auth/login.ts","line":42,"severity":"blocker","text":"SQL injection risk: user input '${username}' is interpolated directly into SQL query. Use parameterized queries."},{"path":"src/utils/format.ts","line":17,"severity":"low","text":"Comment says 'Temporary workaround' with no removal date or tracking issue."},{"path":"src/utils/__tests__/format.test.ts","line":6,"severity":"medium","text":"Test assertion uses loose suffix match (toMatch). Tighten to assert full identity."},{"path":"src/config/settings.json","line":3,"severity":"medium","text":"Config path changed from '~/.claude/plugins' to '~/.claude/toolu/plugins' — a migration warning must surface in-session for existing users."}],"other_checks":"- TypeScript compilation passes (tsc --noEmit)\n- ESLint reports no new errors\n- Binary file app/icon.png changed but not reviewed","top_must_fix":["**`src/auth/login.ts:42`** — SQL injection: use parameterized query instead of string interpolation.","**`src/config/settings.json:3`** — Add migration warning for plugin path change.","**`src/utils/__tests__/format.test.ts:6`** — Tighten test assertion to full identity match."]}
